items.title: Lorde on Spotify’s AI Song Descriptions: “We Don’t Want This”
items.summary: On Instagram, the singer wrote that an ”inaccurate” AI-generated summary of “Current Affairs“ “limits free interpretation"

items.summary: It’s the latest single from her forthcoming album Day and Night

items.title: Coachella Organizers Announce New Santa Monica Beach Festival
items.summary: The Killers and Olivia Dean will headline the first Ocean Way Festival

items.title: Echo and the Bunnymen Reveal First Album in 12 Years
items.summary: Apples for Isaac features contributions from late drummer Clem Burke
